Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,063,007Details

Total $16,070,302

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,603,376 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:78.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,551 opening theaters/2,551 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $33,138,601

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 20th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: August 14th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for brutal violence and terror, brief nudity and language
Running Time: 85 minutes
Franchise: Vacancy
Plot point: Motel, Relationships Gone Wrong, Snuff Film
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
